judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but deeply unprofitable with significant debt and negative cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 16.3%; next earnings date 2026-05-07.
positives: Revenue growth 111.6% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Gross margin 69.4% — high gross profitability on services.
Mean analyst target $138.90 suggests upside potential.
negatives: Operating margin -6.9% and Profit margin -25.6% — significant operating losses.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-8.56B — burning cash at an alarming rate.
Current ratio 0.32 and Quick ratio 0.25 — liquidity concerns.
Analyst growth estimates for current Q and FY are sharply negative.

news.paragraph: CoreWeave is being highlighted by hedge funds for its role in AI supply chains, with a recent film's production costs underscoring the significant investment in AI compute. This suggests strong demand for the company's infrastructure, though the high costs associated with AI development are also evident. Traders should consider the implications of rapid AI adoption on CoreWeave's growth trajectory and cost structure.

headlines.title: AI supply chain, Gen Z spending among hedge fund picks at Sohn Hong Kong
This Cannes Film Cost $500,000 to Make. $400,000 Was AI Compute Costs.
